TestWorkspace.tsx.note: reference only; out of scope for this extraction

Custom.cellValue: textarea value from customTableEdits or normalized docTableRows
Custom.meta: adoption label, warning badge, row count

Validation.legacyFallback: rowLabel uses parseTableField(field.value); no legacy table body rendering in snippet
Validation.meta: validation status dot/classes, confidence, adoption, missingExpectedWarning

differenceMatrix.notes: same tableRows policy, but Custom/Validation wrap different item state
conditions are similar but mounted in different UI contexts

differenceMatrix.Validation: rowLabel fallback only, no comparable body branch observed
differenceMatrix.notes: fallback behavior differs enough to avoid one renderer now

differenceMatrix.Custom: normalizeCell into editRows, textarea empty string

differenceMatrix.notes: prop can absorb but UX differs

differenceMatrix.Validation: labelKo + key subtitle inside validation block
differenceMatrix.notes: mostly same markup but containers differ
can share view model, renderer props may grow
major reason against immediate common renderer

differenceMatrix.Preview: not per table cell; warning badge

abcDecision.label: view model / pure helper only
whyNotA: difference axes are 12, more than the A threshold
HIGH-risk axes exist: legacy fallback, editable, validation/GT status
Custom textarea editing and Validation status wrapper would make a common renderer prop-heavy
whyNotC: structured table data policy is shared through docTableRows/docTableDisplayCols
rowIndex and column order are already centralized in buildInvoicePreviewCols
a pure view model can be fixture-tested without touching JSX
abcDecision.recommendedNext: Do not extract a common React renderer first. If continuing, extract a pure table view-model helper after creating preview/custom/validation view-model fixtures.

inputTypeDraft.editRows: Record<string, string>[] | null for custom only

outputTypeDraft.modeMetadata: rowLabel, warning badge, validation/adoption/confidence metadata as needed

bOption.reactDependency: No React dependency required for view model. JSX stays in OcrResultPanel or later components.

commonRendererPossibility.reason: Too many mode-specific differences; common renderer props would become complex before fixtures exist.

fixtureStrategy.recommendation: For B, create view-model JSON fixtures before extraction. Avoid DOM snapshot until/if common renderer extraction is attempted.
cases: synthetic legacy parseTableField fallback without document_fields.tableRows
optional custom editRows fixture for textarea value behavior
fixtureStrategy.beforeAfter: deep equality for view model JSON, plus existing Clean JSON and Markdown fixture runners
fixtureStrategy.ifAChosenLater: Use Playwright/screenshot or DOM snapshot only after view model fixture is stable.

risks.mitigation: Do not compute rowIndex in renderer; consume docTableDisplayCols only.
Include trade_3 view model fixture and Clean JSON runner.
Leave Custom JSX in place; model editRows separately.
Do not merge Validation renderer in first pass.
Keep metadata outside core table renderer or model explicitly.
Create synthetic fallback fixture before extraction.
Choose B, not A, for next step.
View model may import invoiceTableDisplay/formatters only; not Clean JSON/Markdown.
Reference only; handle in separate approved task.

include: Clean JSON builder extraction and fixture runners
Markdown builder extraction and fixture runners
deferred trade_3 policy, TestWorkspace cleanup, nextVitals stderr noise
reopenTriggers: Clean JSON v2 info/tables work starts
